Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: We can see both 'formations' we are currently controlling by using the Formation Manager at the top left.
Note that formations can consist of only one unit, such as the P-3C Orion, or multiple units, such as our surface ship group.

You can select either formation by double clicking on them in the Formation Manager. Note: right clicking on units in the Formation Manager provides the same context menu as right clicking on them from the 3D view, or from Tactical Display.
